summary: 0.6.49 fixes discovered media playlist ordering so shuffle-off numbered images stay in natural sequence while preserving the new image-slider transport seam.
operatorSignals: The new image scrubbing was working correctly, but sequential images were still showing out of order with shuffle off.
The requested follow-up was to check ordering independently instead of disturbing the scrub logic.
actionsTaken: Traced shuffle-off ordering back to playlist discovery using plain lexicographic sort.
Introduced one shared natural media ordering helper in the shared runtime parity seam.
Applied that helper to both player and witness discovery paths.
nonGoals: No slideshow behavior in this slice.
No new scrub-preview cadence, input changes, or builder layout changes in this slice.
